description: A research agent that searches clinical trials on ClinicalTrials.gov, queries FDA-approved drug information from OpenFDA, and creates data visualizations like pie charts.
name: ClinicalTrialsResearcher

skills.description: Search for clinical trials matching specified criteria on ClinicalTrials.gov API v2. Supports filtering by condition, intervention, comparison, outcome, location, sponsor, study ID, title, and patient characteristics.
skills.name: search_trials

skills.description: Get detailed information about a specific clinical trial by its NCT ID from the ClinicalTrials.gov API v2, including summary, phase, status, eligibility, interventions, sponsors, and outcomes.
skills.name: get_trial_details

skills.description: Query the OpenFDA drugsfda API for FDA-approved drugs by condition (indication) with optional route-of-administration filtering. Returns total drug count, route breakdown, and example drug names.
skills.name: get_approved_drugs

skills.description: Generate a pie chart from label-value data, upload the image to S3, and return a presigned URL valid for 1 hour.
skills.name: create_pie_chart
